site.name: Nirbhay Knitting Industries Pvt. Ltd.

heroVariantB.title: Engineered Technical Textiles for Coating, Lamination & Performance
heroVariantB.subtitle: Consistent substrates. Predictable performance.
heroVariantB.description: Founded by Late Mr. Rohit D. Kamdar, NKI started off as a company offering high-quality polyester fabrics for the synthetic leather industry. Under the leadership of our CMD, Mr. Rajeev Kamdar, the company has expanded across horizons — never compromising on Quality and Sustainability. Today, we are proud to say that we are a certified ZERO DISCHARGE COMPANY.

spotlight.title: Full in-house production, coating Solutions, and sustainability discipline
spotlight.description: Nirbhay's strength comes from connecting fabric expertise with coating knowledge, process control, responsive delivery, and customization — built on trust, transparency, and technical excellence.

panels.title: Knitted Fabric Platform

finalCta.title: Ready to develop a material program with us?
finalCta.description: Talk to our team about knitted substrates, coated textiles, PU coating, laminating, recycled yarn options, FR developments, or contract manufacturing for your next project.

journeySection.title: How Nirbhay Is Evolving
journeySection.storyTitle: Engineering precision with sustainable innovation for over 40 years
paragraphs: Nirbhay started off as a company offering high-quality polyester fabrics for the synthetic leather industry. Founded by Late Mr. Rohit D. Kamdar, the company quickly established itself as a trusted name in the industry.

After the sudden demise of our founder, the baton was handed over to a confident young man, his son and our current CMD, Mr. Rajeev Kamdar. Under his leadership, the company has expanded across horizons.
Two things Mr. Kamdar has never compromised on are Quality and Sustainability. And today, we are proud to say that we are a certified ZERO DISCHARGE COMPANY.

In 2020, as part of our portfolio diversification plan, we expanded into trading of Chemicals, under the brand, NirChem. NirChem deals in all kinds of chemicals needed, across various industries ranging from synthetic leather to direct coating.

milestones.title: Commencement
milestones.description: Founded by Late Mr. Rohit D. Kamdar, Nirbhay Knitting Industries began its journey offering high-quality polyester fabrics for the synthetic leather industry.

milestones.title: Expansion of Production Facilities
milestones.description: Under growing demand and visionary leadership, the company expanded production facilities across multiple phases, adding advanced circular knitting machines and scaling capacity.

milestones.title: Commencement of Processing Facilities
milestones.description: Established in-house processing capabilities with stenter and finishing lines, enabling complete fabric processing under one roof.

milestones.title: Development of Fire Retardant Fabrics
milestones.description: As the saying goes, it always seems impossible until it's done. With incessant work and round-the-clock efforts of our technical team, we began manufacturing standard FR fabrics.

milestones.title: Development of 3D Spacer Fabric
milestones.description: With years of R&D we managed to achieve 3D spacer fabrics available in a wide range of thicknesses starting from 1mm all the way to 3.5mm and above.

milestones.title: Partnership with Interplast Kimya & Establishment of Chemical Division
milestones.description: As part of our portfolio diversification plan, we expanded into trading of chemicals under the brand NirChem, and partnered with Interplast Kimya, Istanbul, Turkey.

milestones.title: Complete Shift to Water-Free Processing
milestones.description: Achieved complete water-free processing across all fabric categories including raised and spacer fabrics, cementing our status as a certified zero discharge company.

story.tag: NK — All Fabrics Without the Use of Water
story.title: Built for industrial performance, positioned for international growth
paragraphs: Having been in the industry for over 40 years, we have mastered the art of offering fabrics engineered to be highly technical while having the best handfeel achievable. Our range of raised fabrics is testimony to exactly that.

With years of R&D we have managed to achieve 3D spacer fabrics available in a wide range of thicknesses starting from 1mm all the way to 3.5mm and above. As the saying goes, it always seems impossible until it's done — with incessant work and round-the-clock efforts of our technical team, we now manufacture standard FR fabrics.

Our range of fabrics combined with our range of chemicals puts us in a unique position to offer the most technically advanced products — or product combinations — to our diverse clientele. All manufactured without the use of water.

innovation.title: Bio-based and Water-based PU Systems
innovation.description: In NirChem, by the introduction of water-based and bio-based PUs, we pledge our support to initiatives like the CBE JU of the European Union, promoting the use of bio-based PUs.
innovation.detail: Our commitment to sustainable chemistry drives the development of water-based and bio-based polyurethane systems that reduce environmental impact while maintaining performance across synthetic leather, genuine leather, and direct coating applications.

partnership.title: Strategic Partnership with ANEX by Interplast
partnership.description: We are the certified agents for Interplast Kimya, based out of Istanbul, Turkey, specialising in chemicals for different types of coating. Our strategic partnership with ANEX by Interplast strengthens our position as a comprehensive chemicals solutions provider.

contentBlock.title: Your partner in coating chemicals
contentBlock.description: NirChem offers a wide range of solvent-based, water-based, and bio-based chemicals for various industries including Synthetic Leather, Genuine Leather, and Direct Coating. As certified agents for Interplast Kimya, we bring world-class chemical solutions to our diverse clientele.

intro.title: Our commitment to the environment
paragraphs: We at Nirbhay, believe that growth is irrelevant without sustainability and hence we have consciously taken steps to ensure that we do as much as we can for the environment.
The first step was to ensure that no water is used in manufacturing and processing any of our fabrics. This makes us a ZERO DISCHARGE COMPANY.
At our manufacturing facility in Halol, Gujarat, we have 70,000 Sq. Ft of green space to contribute to a healthier environment.
We only use electricity and gas as our sources of energy.
In NirChem, by the introduction of water-based and bio-based PUs, we pledge our support to initiatives like the CBE JU of the European Union, promoting the use of bio-based PUs.

pillars.description: The first step was to ensure that no water is used in manufacturing and processing any of our fabrics. This makes us a ZERO DISCHARGE COMPANY.

leadership.bio: The management team guides Nirbhay's direction as an integrated materials and coatings partner, with emphasis on engineering precision, sustainable innovation, and long-term partnerships.
